DEVICE_NAME_DOC: The Bluetooth name advertised to other devices
DISCOVERABLE_DOC: Allow other Bluetooth devices to discover and connect to this device
AUTO_ACCEPT_DOC: Automatically accept incoming Bluetooth pairing requests
PAIRED_DEVICES_DOC: Bluetooth devices currently paired with this system
REMOVE_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to remove this device?
SCAN_DOC: Search for nearby Bluetooth devices. Tap a device name below to pair it.
DEVICES_FOUND: devices found — tap a device below to pair
SERVICE_START_FAILED: Failed to start Bluetooth audio service
LATENCY_MODE_DOC: Lower latency improves audio-video sync but may cause audio glitches on slow hardware
